calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Kenneth Hinkle, individually and dba Hinkle's Sand & Gravel.
Default was entered against defendant on October 7, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 7, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on October 13, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant Kenneth Hinkle, individually and dba Hinkle's Sand & Gravel as follows:

Damages/Principal - $146,090.77.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,564.28.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $405.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $157,560.05.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Off Calendar
